name: Apple Coffeecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend brown sugar, 2 tbsp flour, margarine, and cinnamon in a bowl. Set aside.
2. In another bowl, combine sugar, shortening, egg, and milk. Beat thoroughly until the mixture is smooth.
3. Gradually stir in 1 1/2 cups of flour, baking powder, and salt into the egg mixture just until combined.
4. Spread half of the batter in a greased 9-inch square pan.
5. Arrange half of the thinly sliced apples on top of the batter, followed by half of the brown sugar mixture.
6. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
7. Bake at 375°F for 45-50 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
